minimum_evidence: Assembly-supported structure with no clear independent contradiction
required_review: Dotplot plus read/Hi-C/k-mer or alternate-reference review
default_bias: Retain unless a clear error is demonstrated

minimum_evidence: Dotplot discordance plus at least one independent support track at the same coordinate
required_review: IGV reference-to-assembly inspection plus breakpoint validation
default_bias: Do not break unless coordinate is defensible

minimum_evidence: Orientation conflict supported by Hi-C or multiple close references
required_review: Rule out cultivar-specific inversion and reference error
default_bias: Retain current orientation unless independent support is strong
downstream_action: Regenerate AGP/dotplots and document orientation evidence.

minimum_evidence: Contamination/organelle/vector/adaptor evidence or unsupported tiny artifact
required_review: Taxonomy screen, coverage, sequence content, and release policy review
default_bias: Retain or submit separately until evidence is clear
downstream_action: Remove from nuclear FASTA and update manifest/decision logs.

minimum_evidence: Localized low-confidence sequence, adapter/vector, or repeat region not requiring removal
default_bias: Prefer targeted masking over sequence deletion for localized issues
downstream_action: Regenerate masked FASTA and annotation inputs as needed.

minimum_evidence: Real non-nuclear or alternate sequence that should not be in the nuclear assembly
default_bias: Do not discard biologically valid sequence
downstream_action: Prepare separate record or alternate/haplotype release plan.
